deps.zod: 3 (zod 4 is a follow-up; v9 storybook still on zod 3 alongside resolvers 3)

bundler.comment: React 19: skip the v18 react-dom/client shim (dropped namespace forwarding). Importmap externalises react in the react-dom URL so esm.sh doesn't inline a second React inside the react-dom build — that produced the `dispatcher.getOwner is not a function` error in PR #152's hunt.
